by_id.test: full suite run this session: tests/integration/test_events_endpoint.py, tests/integration/test_usage_endpoint.py, tests/integration/test_quotas_endpoint.py all green unchanged; verified this session via `git diff HEAD --name-only` + `git ls-files --others` that no file under alembic/versions/ was added or modified
by_id.reason: negative criterion: existing endpoint suites pass unchanged and no new migration exists

debugging root-caused the true bottleneck (chunk-per-row streaming fanned out through 4 nested BaseHTTPMiddleware layers, not CSV encoding) and fixed it within the approved design (batched chunking, precompiled str.translate escape, tuned yield_per on the server-side cursor). The HUMAN confirmed a revised, binding budget of p95 <= 3,000ms at the 100,000-row cap at the 2026-07-09 escalation (superseding the original 500ms aspiration, recorded as unreachable within the mandated constant-memory streaming design -- see .pipeline/debug-notes.md). The test now HARD-ASSERTS this bound over a 10-sample stable measurement; this session's re-run measured p95=1,643.87ms / min=1,093.57ms / median=1,385.42ms, comfortably under the 3,000ms bound and consistent with debug-notes' own stable-sample figures (min 1,139ms / median 1,374ms / p95 2,073ms).
info event with rowCount/capped/completed and no raw customer_id; warn event on over-cap; completed=false on mid-stream failure
delegated to the security stage per acceptance.md frontmatter (delegated_criteria: [AC18]) -- ASVS reconciliation, not a test-suite assertion
served /openapi.json includes the route with its 200 text/csv and 422 responses

the pre-existing test_seed_api_key_script.py proves the script persists a working key row but never calls any endpoint with the printed key -- this was a genuine gap; the added test runs the real seed script and calls the export route with its printed key, closing it

scenario.workload: sequential export requests of the caller's full 100,000-row usage_rollup set, in-process ASGI transport against a real Postgres testcontainer, 10-sample stable measurement (revised from a 2-sample directional run)
scenario.contention: none -- single client, single tenant, no concurrent requests
scenario.optional_egress: none (no webhook/external call on this path)
scenario.note: budget revised from the plan's originally-proposed 500ms (unconfirmed) to a HUMAN-confirmed p95<=3,000ms at the 2026-07-09 debugging escalation, after a genuine within-design optimization pass (batched chunking, precompiled CSV escape, tuned yield_per) reduced p95 from ~10.7s to a stable ~1.4-2.1s; see .pipeline/debug-notes.md
